Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.arts.Artwork

Packages that use Artwork
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.jscience.social.arts.theater
- plays, performances, dramatic arts.

    Book
    Represents a book or publication within the literary arts.

    Film
    Represents a film or motion picture within the cinematic arts.

    Picture
    Represents a visual artwork such as a painting, drawing, or photograph.
